residuals.risk: Solar may be interpreted as mandatory for every component or deployment.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject any profile that requires solar, owned hardware or one universal topology.

residuals.risk: Auxiliary generation may be credited to the storage-only reserve.
residuals.stop_condition: Storage-only pass must be computed only from usable storage, critical load, reserves and margin.

residuals.risk: Load shedding may remove distress handling before convenience or mission-support loads.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject a policy that sheds L0 before hardware safety requires cutoff.

residuals.risk: Modeled capacity, solar yield or runtime may differ materially from an implementation.
residuals.gate_or_task: P1a-06 and P1a-07 optional evidence lane
residuals.stop_condition: Do not elevate a claim above simulated without exact configuration, load trace and physical evidence pack.

residuals.risk: Batteries, generators or improvised source combinations can create fire, carbon monoxide, shock or backfeed hazards.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject a field claim without source-specific protections, competent local operation and stop procedures.

residuals.risk: A bounded sustainable-under-profile claim may be presented as perpetual operation.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject unbounded lifetime language or a claim missing load, environment, maintenance and evidence window.

residuals.risk: A logistics replacement architecture may fail when inventory, actor or charging throughput is unavailable.
residuals.gate_or_task: OS-07 reference builds and reuse guides
residuals.stop_condition: Do not claim extended runtime until replacement interval, inventory, actor and missed-service fallback are declared.
